name: Danaher Corporation
confidenceReason: Historically elite compounder (450%+ total return over 10 years). Currently in a trough: ROIC depressed at ~6.8%, mid-single-digit growth. Integrating $9.9B Masimo acquisition. Could be a re-entry point for patient investors.
bullCase: Historically elite serial acquirer with proven Danaher Business System (DBS). 450%+ total return over 10 years. Current trough could be a re-entry point. Masimo acquisition adds new capabilities.
bearCase: ROIC depressed at ~6.8%. Mid-single-digit growth. Integration risk from $9.9B Masimo acquisition. Recovery timeline uncertain.
